title: Sub-agent spawn respects depth=1 hard cap

When flag is off, spawn emits outcome=gated and never invokes the agent?
Event payload includes budgetSnapshot.depth and budgetSnapshot.activeChildren?
Throw inside agent invocation surfaces as outcome=error with note?
